title: "Master" Board Template
excerpt: Is there a way to have a “master” project board? For example, we have a template that gets used for about 60 projects. Currently, if I decide to add a task I have to go in and add the same task to all 60 boards. Is there…

posts.author: brianlutt (Brian L)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have a “master” project board? For example, we have a template that gets used for about 60 projects. Currently, if I decide to add a task I have to go in and add the same task to all 60 boards. Is there a way to add a task to a template and it gets added to all 60 boards automatically?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brianlutt - This is an upcoming feature for Enterprise plans, targeted for sometime in the first half of 2022 from what I hear. If you would like to explore whether Enterprise is right for you, I’d be happy to provide a free consult and demo. You can book one here: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

We can also add you to our list of clients who are awaiting this feature and see if we can get you into the early testing group when it is in limited release.
